observations: First SGLang attempt failed before model load because sgl_kernel could not import common_ops: libnuma.so.1 missing.
Second SGLang attempt loaded all 27 checkpoint shards as Qwen3_5MoeForConditionalGeneration, allocated Mamba cache and KV cache, and the HTTP server answered /health with 503 rather than being dead.
The readiness loop accidentally hammered /health because every 503 generated a log line and the loop did not sleep when a line was available. This likely added noise/load during initialization.
Patched modal_sglang_bench.py to throttle health polling and cap --max-total-tokens at 8192 for faster debug startup.
